rulings.Case Title: WATERVIEW DEVELOPMENT LLC VS. VINCENT T.C. TAI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 14, 2014, Line 5: DEFENDANT VINCENT TAI's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT: Sustained without leave to amend as to the first cause of action for specific performance. Contrary to the Court's July 29, 2014 order Plaintiff continues to allege specific performance regarding delivery of real property without Sanger easement. No other allegations regarding specific performance are made. Plaintiff shall have 10 days leave to amend to allege in good faith a cause of action for breach of contract as referenced in opposition 2:12-13. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: RAINER GEISSLER VS. JAMES R QUEDADO
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, November 14, 2014, Line 13: DEFENDANT JAMES QUEDADO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT: Sustained without leave to amend.
